title: Cracknel
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Food |image=[[File:Kragnols.png]] |name=Cracknel |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found=[[Dex's Diner]] |type= |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible= |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Cracknels for the ladies.''"
"''Awesome.|[[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], when serving [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] some Cracknels|''[[Star Wars Detours]]''}} The '''Cracknel''' was a popular appetizer. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] personal [[chef]] [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]] considered serving cracknels to his master.{{StoryCite|story=Taster's Choice: The Tale of Jabba's Chef|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{Food-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== The cracknel would have made its first visual appearance in the unreleased and non-canon series ''[[Star Wars Detours]]'', where they were depicted as a kind of blue-colored finger food served at [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] had eaten it regularly there since she was a young child. She enjoyed eating it with plenty of [[Pepper/Legends|pepper]].{{YouTube|channel=@holonet|name=Star Wars HoloNet|text=Star Wars: Detours - Extrait #3|video=j5r28SwZk7Y}} ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Taster's Choice: The Tale of Jabba's Chef|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} ===Non-canon appearances=== *''[[Star Wars Detours]]'' {{C|canceled}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Hors d'oeuvre]]
